name: KrillApp.Project.Camera
title: Camera
description: Connects to a camera device on the Raspberry Pi and streams live video. Configure resolution, framerate, and rotation. Snapshots are served via the camera endpoint.
shortDescription: Live camera feed from a Raspberry Pi camera module or USB camera.
llmPurpose: Provides live camera feed and snapshot capture from Raspberry Pi cameras.
llmBehavior: captures snapshots from connected camera hardware
streams JPEG frames at configured framerate
serves snapshots via authenticated HTTP endpoint
llmTypicalUseCases: monitor a physical location with a Pi camera
add a security camera to a project
llmCreationHints: Create a Camera node under a Project when the user wants live video or snapshot capture from a Raspberry Pi camera. Requires a camera module or USB camera connected to the Pi.

llmConnectionHints.role: sensor node that captures video frames from camera hardware

llmExamples: Add a camera to my project so I can see a live feed.
Set up a security camera on the Raspberry Pi.
Show me what the Pi camera sees.
Capture a snapshot from the connected camera.
